entry.title: Perplexity’s grand theft AI
entry.quote: Perplexity’s scraping of Forbes’ work wasn’t an exception. In fact, Perplexity has been ignoring the robots.txt code that explicitly asks web crawlers not to scrape the page.

entry.title: Larry Finger made Linux wireless work and brought others along to learn
entry.quote: Remembering Finger, 84, who learned as he went and left his mark on many.

entry.title: How AI Revolutionized Protein Science, but Didn’t End It
entry.quote: Three years ago, Google’s AlphaFold pulled off the biggest artificial intelligence breakthrough in science to date, accelerating molecular research and kindling deep questions about why we do science.

entry.title: Deneb-Showcase
entry.quote: This is a collection of advanced dataviz examples using Vega, Vega-Lite, Deneb and Power BI.

entry.title: Epsilon Love
entry.quote: So I guess the lesson is that if you’re not Ken Thompson, you’re going to have trouble understanding what he did until you’ve tried and failed yourself?
